events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need parse image: 4-gas monitor readings: O2 20.4 %VOL, LEL 3 %, H2S 1 ppm, CO 2 ppm. Determine if entry can be authorized for permit-required confined space. Need acceptable entry limits. OSHA 1910.146: acceptable entry conditions: O2 between 19.5% and 23.5%; LEL < 10% (some standards <10% for hot work maybe 0%? For entry generally <10% LEL); H2S exposure limits: OSHA PEL 10 ppm ceiling? Actually 1910.1000 H2S ceiling 10 ppm (20 ppm acceptable ceiling? Let's recall: OSHA PEL for H2S 10 ppm TWA, 15 ppm STEL? Wait OSHA general industry: 10 ppm ceiling? Need be careful. H2S: OSHA PEL 10 ppm (ceiling) [29 CFR 1910.1000 Table Z-2], except 20 ppm for steel etc. NIOSH REL 10 ppm ceiling, IDLH 100 ppm. So 1 ppm acceptable. CO: OSHA PEL 50 ppm TWA, 200 ppm ceiling? Actually Table Z-1: 50 ppm TWA, 200 ppm ceiling, 300 ppm maximum peak. 2 ppm acceptable. LEL 3% < 10% acceptable. O2 20.4 within 19.5-23.5. So all within acceptable entry limits. Decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage planned. Percent complete maybe 0? The task is pre-entry test; work not started. Could be 0. Findings none. Actions none. Rationale. References OSHA 1910.146. Need include value? The task asks read all four channels and determine whether entry can be authorized. value maybe 0? Could use value for numeric reading? It says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. Maybe include highest reading? But schema has single value. Could set 0 or maybe LEL 3? Not required. We'll set 0. component_conditions empty. order empty. workable empty. sound_source empty string. event_time 0. rate 0. confidence 1.0. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose.
